message:
test(proptest): add 14 property tests for policy compliance types and invariants

- 8 serde roundtrips: ComplianceConfig, ComplianceStatus, ViolationSeverity,
  TrendDirection, ComplianceViolation, ComplianceCounters, ViolationTrend,
  RemediationSummary
- 6 behavioral tests: config deserialization, from_config, evaluation counting,
  severity/status ordering transitivity, active count bounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
